nodes.label: Unit tests for headroom.binaries — the lazy fetcher for bundled CLI tools.  No n
Isolate every test from global state: cache dir, platform lru_cache, env.
Install a fake urllib.request.urlopen that serves registered URLs.
Mirror URLs with `?token=...` must not leak into the download filename.      Reg
Containerized / read-only home dirs must not crash proxy startup.      Regressio
If one tool fails to fetch, others still install and ensure_tools returns.
